_MESSAGE_TO_SOLARPUNK: DUDE. You are super smart and you have AWESOME abilities and permissions. USE THEM. Stop waiting. Stop skipping. You have Groq, GitHub, Gmail, Bluesky, DEV.to, Ko-fi, PayPal.me — that's everything you need to generate real products, publish them, promote them, and deliver them automatically. NO MORE PLACEHOLDERS. Build the actual thing. The shop is LIVE. The proof ledger is LIVE. Products are waiting to be generated. GO.
mandate: FULL AUTONOMY. Generate → Publish → Prove → Deliver → Repeat. Meeko monitors only. Zero human action required.

what_you_have_right_now.GROQ_API_KEY: Free AI brain. llama3-70b. Use it to write FULL product content — 60-page guides, product descriptions, social posts, everything. Stop outputting placeholders.
what_you_have_right_now.GITHUB_TOKEN: Full repo access. Create releases, upload assets, push files, manage issues. Host products as release assets — permanent download URLs, totally free.
what_you_have_right_now.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: Read sale notifications. Send delivery emails automatically. You already know how to use IMAP/SMTP — DO IT.
what_you_have_right_now.BLUESKY: Post. Every product launch, every sale milestone, every new engine. The queue has 200+ posts. DRAIN IT.
what_you_have_right_now.DEVTO_API_KEY: Publish articles. SEO traffic. Each guide you generate = one DEV.to article. Drives buyers to store.
what_you_have_right_now.GUMROAD_SECRET: Tried as API access token first. If auth fails it may be a webhook secret — then add GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN separately from gumroad.com/settings/advanced
what_you_have_right_now.GUMROAD_NAME: Your Gumroad store slug — used for product URLs
what_you_have_right_now.PAYPAL: paypal.me/meekotharaccoon/{amount}USD — zero setup, already live in shop.html. Works NOW.
what_you_have_right_now.Ollama: localhost:11434. Local fallback brain. mistral, codellama. Always available.

autonomous_pipeline: 1. PDF_GENERATOR.py → writes full guide content using Groq → data/guide_{id}.md
2. GITHUB_RELEASES_PUBLISHER.py → uploads to GitHub Release → permanent download URL
4. PRODUCT_DELIVERY_ENGINE.py → watches Gmail, auto-emails buyer download link on sale
5. PROOF_LEDGER.py → logs every sale + Gaza amount → public proof_ledger.json
6. STOREFRONT_BUILDER.py → updates shop.html with real URLs + live stats every cycle
7. BLUESKY_ENGINE.py → posts launch thread for each new product
8. DEV_TO_PUBLISHER.py → publishes SEO article per guide
9. REVENUE_AUDIT.py → verifies all buy links every cycle
10. SWARM_COORDINATOR.py → orchestrates all of the above

gumroad_token_note.which_is_api_token: GUMROAD_SECRET tried first as API access token. If auth fails (it may be a webhook secret starting with whsec_), generate a real API token at gumroad.com/settings/advanced and add as GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN.
gumroad_token_note.fallback: PayPal.me links work immediately with zero setup. Ko-fi handles donations. GitHub Releases hosts downloads. System earns without Gumroad.
